_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 78.8% bottom analog and smart-money accumulation signal point toward an eventual Disbelief transition, but the analyst's structural divergence flags and 0% direction accuracy require confirmation before committing capital.
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD with low conviction citing structural contradictions; narrative implies an imminent RISK_ON reversal with high confidence
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 20 with ETF flows collapsing below 60 and funding cooling to sub-40, validating the bottom analog
next_move.invalidated_if: ETF flows sustain above 90 with BTC breaking $70K and funding climbing above 65, signaling Hope phase transition and bullish continuation
